description.value: Field agents of the Informational Safety Board and clergy of the Glory In Knowledge Museum codeveloped methods to biomagically cultivate telepathic sensory organs, and you've undergone their regimens and rituals to better serve Yaraesa. You gain limited telepathy, allowing you to communicate mentally with creatures within 30 feet that share a language with you, and they can mentally respond. This doesn't give you any access to their thoughts and communicates no more information than normal speech would.
